fields.label: Steward
fields.description: User assigned as data steward

fields.label: Stewardship Role
fields.options:
Data Owner
Data Custodian
Data Quality Analyst
Domain Expert
Approver
fields.description: Level of responsibility and access

fields.label: Domain Type
fields.options:
Product Family
Brand
Channel
Attribute Group
All Products
fields.description: Type of data domain for stewardship

fields.label: Domain Value
fields.description: Specific domain value (Product Family, Brand, Channel, etc.)

fields.label: Domain DocType
fields.description: Internal field for Dynamic Link

fields.label: Include Child Categories
fields.description: Also apply stewardship to child categories (for Product Family)

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Priority level (1-10, lower = higher priority) for conflict resolution

fields.label: Can Approve Changes
fields.description: Can approve pending changes and enrichment requests

fields.label: Can Publish
fields.description: Can publish products to channels

fields.label: Can Merge Records
fields.description: Can merge duplicate records (golden record)

fields.label: Can Delete
fields.description: Can delete products in their domain

fields.label: Can Assign Stewards
fields.description: Can assign other stewards within their domain

fields.label: Receive Notifications
fields.description: Receive notifications for changes in domain

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: Start date of stewardship assignment

fields.label: Valid Until
fields.description: End date of stewardship assignment (leave blank for permanent)

fields.label: Backup Steward
fields.description: User to assume responsibilities during absence

fields.label: Escalation To
fields.description: User to escalate unresolved issues to

fields.label: Products in Domain
fields.description: Number of products under this stewardship

fields.label: Pending Approvals
fields.description: Number of items pending approval

fields.label: Average Quality Score
fields.description: Average data quality score in domain

fields.label: Last Activity
fields.description: Last stewardship activity timestamp

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Additional notes about this stewardship assignment
